title: Asuka Rescuing Shinji Explosive Hatch Not Super Strength
display_title: Asuka Rescuing Shinji Explosive Hatch Not Super Strength
wikitext:
[]: Asuka Rescuing Shinji: Explosive Hatch, Not Super Strength             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jul 05, 2013 10:34 am [Split from after here in the 3.33 Things You Noticed thread. - Monk] Mori-kun wrote: Asuka tore the hatch off Shinji's entry plug after N4I with brute force (her possibly having superhuman strength is hinted at here as well as in the Mark.09 invasion scene

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 05, 2013 10:36 am Mori-kun wrote: Asuka tore the hatch off Shinji's entry plug after N4I with brute force (her possibly having superhuman strength is hinted at here as well as in the Mark.09 invasion scene).

[]:             Quote Post by Mori-kun » Fri Jul 05, 2013 11:04 am ElMariachi: TMBounty_Hunter I apologise for that, I forgot to mention that it was fanwank on my part. Also, about the "emergency explosive" thing, neither Gendo nor Shinji used it to open Rei's entry plug in 1.0. It seems the only way to open it is through rotating the lever on the hatch. I understand why NERV modified Eva 13, but Gendo doesn't really seem to care enough for his son to make it easy for Asuka to retrieve him from the plug after 4I by modifying it. Yes, Mari opens the plug through an explosive mechanism after the Bethany Base incident, but that was from the inside.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jul 05, 2013 11:18 am There is two emergency exits in an entry plug : an emergency hatch on the side that opens with a rotating lever(the one we saw Gendo and later Shinji open to look for Rei in 1.0) and another on the top of the entry plug, a smaller hatch on top of the big main hatch that opens with explosive bolts from the outside that Asuka uses in 3.0 to look for Shinji. And apparently there is a third emergency exist opening from the inside that jettison the whole main hatch, used by Mari at the beginning of 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jul 05, 2013 6:52 pm ElMariachi wrote: Looking again at the image, Shinji's heels aren't touching the ground, he's is actually on tiptoe even while seating, which is a known sign of stress and tension. So yeah, I think that it's "just" that Shinji is very tense in this scene(with good reasons!)

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 05, 2013 6:59 pm Kendrix wrote: ...the explosive thing Mari used may just be unique to EVA 05.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jul 05, 2013 7:26 pm M'kay, you win. On to the next suspicious detail!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Jul 05, 2013 9:17 pm I believe the smaller hatch was buried when the plug crashed.

[]:             Quote Post by Karex_Usyrion » Sat Jul 06, 2013 1:46 am Explosive bolts sure is end of that argument. Nevertheless, there are indications Asuka may not be entirely human anymore. Asuka did strike and cracked the interrogation room's plexiglass with Shinji on the other side of it using nothing but her fist.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Jul 06, 2013 3:14 am ^ This is not the thread for that discussion.

[]: Re: Asuka Rescuing Shinji: Explosive Hatch, Not Super Streng             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Sat Jul 06, 2013 6:19 pm ElMariachi wrote: Actually, there is an emergency explosive opening in the main door of the entry plugs, if you look closely, there is a smaller rectangular hatch inside the big rectangular hatch at the top, and if I recall correctly there is handles on both side of that little hatch to trigger the emergency opening, that's what Asuka used.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jul 06, 2013 6:24 pm So one more thing before I leave this alone... Before I remembered about the Q script and it being potentially useful I was digging around for any views of the hatch across all 3 movies and the CRCs. The reason for that is there's a BIG RED LABEL on the secondary big hatch. At least in 2.0. 1.0 is great because it has an x-ray diagram of the plug showing all 3 main hatches. The tiny Ikaris Rescue Rei Hatch The main seat loading hatch. And the smaller hatch cut into the big one. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Jul 06, 2013 9:49 pm "EJECTION COVER" is exactly what I saw before seeing you suggest it. It's not just you.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jul 08, 2013 9:03 am I sent the tangent about Touji and Kensuke being in Eva-01 here .

[]:             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Fri Jul 12, 2013 11:11 pm While I don't think Asuka has the strength she sure as hell has the pain tolerance to land on her feet from at least twenty feet up! Look at where she stands on the entry plug taking L barrier measurements before she jumps off it, when she lands she immediately turns to Shinji and grabs his wrist. I wouldn't getting up or walking after making that fall.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Fri Jul 12, 2013 11:49 pm ::Gendo burns his hands rescuing Rei out of Unit-00:: GENDO: Y'know, that really should have been easier. We should fix that. Anybody got a sticky note for Ritsuko? You're gonna have to write it for me. wiser3754 wrote: While I don't think Asuka has the strength she sure as hell has the pain tolerance to land on her feet from at least twenty feet up! Look at where she stands on the entry plug taking L barrier measurements before she jumps off it, when she lands she immediately turns to Shinji and grabs his wrist. I wouldn't getting up or walking after making that fall.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jul 13, 2013 5:46 am wiser3754 wrote: While I don't think Asuka has the strength she sure as hell has the pain tolerance to land on her feet from at least twenty feet up! Look at where she stands on the entry plug taking L barrier measurements before she jumps off it, when she lands she immediately turns to Shinji and grabs his wrist. I wouldn't getting up or walking after making that fall.
